tasks.subject: Task 1: Bridge files.ts — sanitize + 4 handlers + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bridge에 파일 업로드/다운로드/목록/삭제 핸들러 4개와 sanitize 헬퍼를 TDD로 작성. server.ts 통합은 Task 2.

**Files:**
- Create: `bridge/src/files.ts`
- Create: `bridge/src/files.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- sanitizeFilename basename/NFC/제어문자/255-byte/untitled 폴백
- handleFileUpload 401/413/400/200 + 디스크 작성 확인
- handleFileDownload 인증 없음, 200+headers / 404 / 400
- handleFileList 401 / 200 + 메타 배열
- handleFileDelete 401 / 400 / 200 / 404
- 라운드트립 byte-identical
- Path traversal 차단

**Verify:** `cd bridge && npm test` → files.test.ts 통과 + 기존 테스트 회귀 없음.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/files.ts", "bridge/src/files.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sanitizeFilename", "upload 401/413/400/200", "download 200/404/400", "list 401/200", "delete 401/400/200/404", "roundtrip", "path traversal"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Bridge wire-up — server.ts routes + Quadlet Volume + README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Task 1 핸들러를 server.ts에 라우팅하고 영속 Volume 추가.

**Files:**
- Modify: `bridge/src/server.ts`
- Modify: `bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container`
- Modify: `bridge/README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- BRIDGE_FILES_DIR + BRIDGE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL requireEnv
- 부팅 시 mkdir recursive
- 4 라우트 등록
- Quadlet Volume + Environment
- README 사전 mkdir 안내

**Verify:** `cd bridge && npm run build` 통과, smoke server boot → curl /files → 401.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/server.ts", "bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container", "bridge/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["requireEnv BRIDGE_FILES_DIR + BRIDGE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL", "4 라우트", "Quadlet Volume", "README"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: App SDK — bridgeFileUpload.ts + bridgeFileAdmin.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** bridge /files를 호출할 클라이언트 SDK + 단위 테스트.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/sync/bridgeFileUpload.ts`
- Create: `app/src/lib/sync/bridgeFileAdmin.ts`
- Create: `app/tests/unit/sync/bridgeFileUpload.test.ts`
- Create: `app/tests/unit/sync/bridgeFileAdmin.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- uploadBridgeFile 헤더(Authorization/Content-Type/X-Filename)
- 에러 분류 bridge_not_configured/empty_file/too_large/unauthorized/network/server
- 50 MiB 사전 컷
- listBridgeFiles, deleteBridgeFile
- BridgeFileMeta 타입 export

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- bridgeFileUpload bridgeFileAdmin` 통과.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/sync/bridgeFileUpload.ts", "app/src/lib/sync/bridgeFileAdmin.ts", "app/tests/unit/sync/bridgeFileUpload.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/sync/bridgeFileAdmin.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- bridgeFileUpload bridgeFileAdmin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["uploadBridgeFile", "listBridgeFiles", "deleteBridgeFile", "BridgeFileMeta"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: extractAnyFile + TomboyEditor paste/drop + uploadAndInsertFile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** paste/drop에서 비이미지 fall-through + uploadAndInsertFile 함수.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/extractFile.ts`
- Create: `app/tests/unit/editor/extractFile.test.ts`
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- extractAnyFile 4 케이스(이미지 only/파일 only/이미지+파일/빈)
- handlePaste/handleDrop fall-through
- uploadAndInsertFile insertContent + tomboyUrlLink + 토스트

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- extractFile && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/extractFile.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/extractFile.test.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- extractFile && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["extractAnyFile", "paste/drop fall-through", "uploadAndInsertFile"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Picker UI — Toolbar 버튼 + EditorContextMenu 항목
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 툴바 + 우클릭 메뉴에 파일 첨부 picker.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/Toolbar.svelte`
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/EditorContextMenu.svelte`
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Toolbar onuploadfile prop + 버튼 + accept=*/* input
- ContextMenu 파일 첨부 항목 + 자체 picker
- TomboyEditor가 uploadAndInsertFile을 두 컴포넌트에 전달
- single-file (multiple 없음)

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check` + 수동 dev에서 두 픽커 트리거.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/Toolbar.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/EditorContextMenu.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Toolbar button + input", "ContextMenu item + picker", "TomboyEditor wiring"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: filePreviewPlugin + fileBadge + 등록
tasks.description:
**Goal:** bridge 파일 URL을 detect해 클릭 가능 뱃지로 렌더하는 ProseMirror plugin.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/filePreview/filePreviewPlugin.ts`
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/filePreview/fileBadge.ts`
- Create: `app/tests/unit/editor/filePreview/filePreviewPlugin.test.ts`
- Create: `app/tests/unit/editor/filePreview/fileBadge.test.ts`
- Modify: `app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- createFileBadgeElement filename 추출(decodeURIComponent), 빈 → 파일
- filePreviewPlugin host base getDefaultTerminalBridge+bridgeToHttpBase view() 비동기 + setMeta('rebuild')
- non-bridge URL/잘못된 uuid/비-/files/ prefix 무시
- 라운드트립: archive → unarchive → URL byte-identical

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- filePreview && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/filePreview/filePreviewPlugin.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/filePreview/fileBadge.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/filePreview/filePreviewPlugin.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/filePreview/fileBadge.test.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- filePreview && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fileBadge filename", "URL 매칭", "non-bridge 무시", "roundtrip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: /admin/files 페이지
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /admin/files 파일 목록 + 검색 + 삭제 UI.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/routes/admin/files/+page.svelte`
- Create: `app/tests/unit/routes/admin/files/+page.test.ts`
- Modify: admin nav

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- listBridgeFiles → 테이블(filename/size/mtime/download/delete)
- mtime desc 기본 정렬, filename 부분 일치 검색
- 삭제 confirm → deleteBridgeFile → 즉시 갱신
- 빈 상태 안내
- admin nav 파일 탭

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- admin/files` + dev에서 /admin/files 접근.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/admin/files/+page.svelte", "app/tests/unit/routes/admin/files/+page.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- admin/files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["테이블", "검색", "삭제", "empty", "nav"]}
```
